ACCOUNT_ID.TITLE: Account ID
ACCOUNT_ID.NOTE: This ID is required if you are building an API based integration

NAME.LABEL: 帐户名称
NAME.ERROR: 请输入有效的帐户名称

AUTO_RESOLVE_DURATION.LABEL: Number of days after a ticket should auto resolve if there is no activity
AUTO_RESOLVE_DURATION.ERROR: Please enter a valid auto resolve duration (minimum 1 day and maximum 999 days)

FEATURES.INBOUND_EMAIL_ENABLED: 您的帐户启用了与电子邮件的对话连续性。
FEATURES.CUSTOM_EMAIL_DOMAIN_ENABLED: 您现在可以在您的自定义域名的电子邮件中接收消息。

BOOKING_EMAILS.TITLE: Booking Notification Emails
BOOKING_EMAILS.NOTE: Configure email addresses to receive booking notifications. Only these emails will receive booking alerts. If no emails are added, no booking notifications will be sent.
BOOKING_EMAILS.LABEL: Add email address
BOOKING_EMAILS.HELP: Enter an email address and click Add. You can add multiple email addresses.
BOOKING_EMAILS.EMPTY_STATE: ⚠️ No booking notification emails configured. Add at least one email address to receive booking notifications.
BOOKING_EMAILS.INVALID_EMAIL: Please enter a valid email address
BOOKING_EMAILS.DUPLICATE_EMAIL: This email address is already added
